"[8] his request is for ME. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. SOMEONE is trapped. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. TCC or PSAP systems may garble this language's script. Return messages to the user will not be garbled. This concludes the initial data. Two-way text with the user is now available.11 mins"
